name: Hormozi Offers OS
description: Score, build, name, and prove irresistible offers using Alex Hormozi's $100M Offers framework. Value Equation scoring, Grand Slam Offer 8-layer stack, MAGIC naming, and Proof Stack Builder.
conversation_starters: Score my offer and tell me the #1 fix
Build a Grand Slam Offer for my business
Generate 5 MAGIC names for my offer
Build a proof stack — nobody believes my results
setup_instructions: 1. Go to platform.openai.com/gpts → Create a GPT
2. Paste ALL of chatgpt/system-prompt.md into Instructions
3. Upload all 4 files from skills/offers/references/ as Knowledge
5. Test: 'Score my offer: 12-week coaching for SaaS founders, $5k, results in 90 days'
